prompt: Fammi un audit veloce del repo: cosa è solido, cosa è fragile, cosa toglierei se dovessi lanciare domani?
content:
@flint v0 hybrid
G: audit_repo_pre_launch
C: repo_at_v0_8_2 ∧ five_route_classifier ∧ "13 test files ~2k lines" ∧ "normalize.py 677 lines" ∧ uncommitted_drift_fixer_and_tests ∧ "2.9MB evals/runs" ∧ "10 bench scripts" ∧ build_dir_tracked ∧ local_flint5_tool_orphan
P: identify_solid ∧ identify_fragile ∧ propose_cuts_for_tomorrow_launch
V: tests_green_after_cuts ∧ install_sh_still_works ∧ readme_bench_numbers_still_reproducible
A: solid("parser.py + routing.py + drift_fix_hook + 5-route classifier + honest README table (class_acc 100%, -53% long-ctx tokens) + install.sh opt-in surface + MCP regex-schema path") ∧ fragile("normalize.py 677-line monolith is the blast radius; uncommitted WIP in flint_drift_fixer.py + test_flint_drift_fixer.py not tagged into v0.8.2; bench-script sprawl (10 scripts, overlapping cells) with no single source-of-truth runner; build/ committed + local/flint5-tool orphan confuse new contributors; eval run logs (2.9MB) checked in instead of artifact-store") ∧ cut_before_launch("build/ dir + local/flint5-tool + superseded single-turn bench scripts (claude_code_max, claude_code_max_long, claude_code_max_multiturn tables+shs — keep only vibe_3way + long_multiturn_4var) + evals/runs/stress/*.log + prompts/primitive_english.txt + prompts/verbose_baseline.txt") ∧ commit_or_stash_drift_fixer_wip_before_tag ∧ add_gitignore_for_build_and_runs

input.command: wc -l src/flint/*.py tests/*.py scripts/*.py integrations/claude-code/hooks/*.py 2>/dev/null | tail -40
